candidate_summary: Per-attention-head dual-ring RoPE inspired by Latvian dievturība: 8-phase solar-anchor ring (discrete -π/4 spacing) on K_solar heads, 13-phase lunar-drift ring (2π/13 spacing) on K_lunar heads, Saulgrieži leap-adjust gate resetting lunar to nearest solar spoke at 4 anchor positions, dual-ring coherence loss, and phase-mismatch renormalization at decode.
content_words: latvian dievturība baltic pagan saule solar wheel
ziemas vasaras pavasara rudens solar-anchor realign
8-phase solar-anchor ring R_solar discrete -π/4 spacing K_solar heads
13-phase lunar-drift ring R_lunar fractional 2π/13 K_lunar heads
Saulgrieži leap-adjust gate 4-anchor reset lunar to nearest solar spoke
dual-ring coherence loss L_coh + phase-mismatch detection renorm decode

results.name: Q-ROAR Rethinking RoPE Scaling Quantized Channel-Band
results.rationale: Quantization-aware RoPE channel/band rescaling; no dual-ring solar/lunar phase anchoring, no discrete -π/4 8-spoke or 2π/13 lunar ring, no Saulgrieži-style leap-adjust gate or dual coherence loss.

results.name: Mixed-Frequency RoPE LLMs (EliteKV)
results.rationale: Mixed-frequency RoPE for KV compression; lacks per-head dual-ring (solar 8 + lunar 13) design, anchor gate, or phase-mismatch renorm decode.

results.name: Axial RoPE Banded Scaling Quantized
results.rationale: Axial/banded RoPE scaling under quantization; no 8/13 ring split, no leap-adjust anchor mechanism, no dual coherence loss.

results.name: Frequency Bands RoPE ICLR 2026
results.rationale: Frequency-band partitioning of RoPE; not a dual-ring solar/lunar phase anchor with 8-spoke quantization snap or 13-position lunar drift heads.

results.name: TAPA Token-Aware Phase Attention
results.rationale: Token-aware phase attention adjusts phase but does not implement dual rings (8-solar + 13-lunar), Saulgrieži gate, coherence loss, or |θ_obs-θ_exp|>τ renorm decode.

results.name: Round and Round We Go RoPE
results.rationale: Analysis of RoPE rotational behavior; no dual-ring 8/13 anchor scheme, no leap-adjust gate, no coherence loss term.

results.name: Comparative Study RoPE Positional Encodings
results.rationale: Survey/comparison of RoPE variants; no specific dual-ring solar/lunar design or phase-mismatch renorm decode.

results.name: Block-Attention for Efficient RAG
results.rationale: Block-attention for RAG efficiency; unrelated to RoPE phase rings or dual coherence anchoring.

decision_rationale: No result implements the specific DIEVTURIBA dual-ring per-head RoPE (8-spoke solar snap at -π/4 + 13-position lunar drift) with a Saulgrieži leap-adjust gate, dual-ring coherence loss, and phase-mismatch renorm decode. All retrieved works are generic RoPE scaling/frequency/phase attention or unrelated block-attention; none hit any rubric threshold. Candidate is novel relative to corpus. NOTE: primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.74-0.92 / func 0.74-0.92 on RoPE frequency-band + phase-encoding + block-reset adjacencies; verdict-level disagreement flagged (Pattern E aggregate-adjacency vs per-paper scoring).
